title: cyathocalyx martabanicus
intro: Cyathocalyx martabanicus is a species of plant in the family Annonaceae, native to the Philippines. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antibacterial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Cyathocalyx martabanicus include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which are traditionally used by locals in the Philippines to promote well-being and alleviate symptoms of illness.
